# mesh-89-tracker

> mesh-89-tracker is a sovereign, MIT-licensed tool in the AI-Native Solutions estate. Listed on FallMarket. Ed25519-signed. Runs on your infrastructure.

## Canonical URL

https://sjgant80-hub.github.io/mesh-89-tracker/

## What it is

A sovereign tool that ships as source, runs offline, and outlasts the vendor. Part of a 1330+ listing catalog under @ai-native-solutions/*.
